patch.insert_text: Patient takes no daily prescription medications; hospital medications were tapered down and then discontinued entirely after discharge.
added_claims: Patient takes no daily prescription medications
Hospital medications were tapered down and then discontinued entirely after discharge

reasons: Both claims are supported: 'Nothing regular' backs no daily prescription meds, and 'whittled the list down and then off entirely' backs the taper/discontinuation.
The note references a medication review/reconciliation but never states the patient is on no medications or that hospital meds were tapered off, so this adds new content.
Medication-related detail belongs in Assessment and Plan, consistent with the existing 'Medication review due' section.

patch.insert_text: Patient reports no daily prescription medications; hospital medications were tapered off and discontinued at follow-up visits.
added_claims: Patient takes no daily prescription medications
Hospital medications were tapered off and discontinued at follow-up visits

reasons: First claim (no daily prescription medications) is supported by 'Nothing regular.'

Second claim's phrase 'discontinued at follow-up visits' is not supported; evidence says medications were whittled down 'and then off entirely' after leaving the hospital, with no mention of follow-up visits.
Insertion adds specific medication detail not already in the note, so non-redundant.
Medication content correctly belongs in the Assessment and Plan medication review section.
